Clans, families, sects, schools, guilds, empires, crews and other organizations across the four series. Seeded from the books; grows with community edits.

; Groups by series
* [[:Category:Traveler's Gate groups|Groups of Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Elder Empire groups|Groups of Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Cradle groups|Groups of Cradle]]
* [[:Category:The Last Horizon groups|Groups of The Last Horizon]]

[[Category:Content]]
